name: Low-Fat Red Beans and Rice (High Fiber)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large nonstick saucepan over high heat, combine all ingredients except the rice.
2. Bring to a boil and then boil for 1 minute.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Add water if needed.
4. Serve over rice. Makes 4 servings.
5. Calories: 157 | Fat: 1 g | Fiber: 6.2 g.
